items.title: Best of 9to5Toys – This week’s top deals: 2026 MacBooks, Mother’s Day gifts, more
items.summary:
Good morning and welcome to Best of 9to5Toys Weekly – a one-stop shop for all of the week’s best deals on Apple gear, Samsung and Android tech, accessories for smartphones and Macs, intelligent household upgrades, and even deals to update your wardrobe. The all-new Best of 9to5Toys collects all of the most notable deals and organizes them neatly into one handy catalog for you to peruse every Saturday morning, and this week we have the best Apple weekend deals ahead of Mother’s Day, giant price drops on Samsung Galaxy Tab models, and much more.

more…

items.title: Some sweet gift ideas Mom will love: Smart bird feeders, wearables, affordable tablets, wellness items, more
items.summary:
Mom’s big day is right around the corner, and whoever that person is for you in your life, the clock is ticking to secure them a sweet gift to show your appreciation. We have tried to stray away from the obvious flowers and the like (as much as our moms usually love those) in favor of some more substantial tech, gadgets, and gear to make mom’s summer and beyond a more enjoyable one.

items.title: 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly: Amazon Gaming Week sale, up to $600 off gaming monitors, handhelds, more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly – your go-to spot for the notable deals and latest releases in PC gaming at a glance every Saturday morning. We saw some great offers on high refresh-rate gaming monitors this week, and most of them are still live and waiting for you below, alongside some other deals we tracked on laptops and peripherals as part of the ongoing Gaming Week sale at Amazon. Best Buy even has open-box units of the latest Xbox ROG Ally handhelds in case you want to snag those now that Microsoft has rolled out some updates to the system. Besides that we also tracked a bunch of deals on productivity gear and workstation accessories, and you’ll find them all highlighted below in this week’s Battlestation Weekly.

items.title: Nintendo gift card deals live at Amazon still – Land some discounted Switch 1/2 games and more
items.summary:
Amazon has $10 Nintendo gift cards on sale today. Switch and Switch 2 games are expensive, and so is all the hardware. Deals, especially on the new stuff can be very had to come by, but these discounted gift cards can certainly help the case – you’re effectively trading money for more money to spend on the eShop and Nintendo store here.

We recently featured the new 39-inch UltraGear evo GX9 as pre-orders are set to come to close very soon on the “world’s first 39-inch 5K2K OLED Gaming Monitor.” But today we are turning our attention to LG’s Apple Studio Display alternative at close to half the price with the 32-inch UltraFine evo 6K Nano IPS Black Monitor with Thunderbolt 5.

items.title: Electrified Weekly – Lectric e-bikes get up to $793 savings, ENGWE e-bikes get up to $1,048 savings, Exclusive mini dirt bike low, more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. This week, while we’ve seen great deals in all four of our green tech categories, it’s been the e-bikes and EVs that have been especially packed. We’ve got Lectric’s Mother’s Day Sale with up to $793 e-bike savings starting from $799, as well as Ride1Up’s latest savings event giving us a new all-time low price on the Prodigy V2 Mid-Drive 9-Speed e-bike. There’s also ENGWE’s 12th Anniversary Sale with up to $1,048 savings on three of its newest e-bikes starting from $999, as well as Heybike’s 5th Anniversary Sale dropping the Mars 3.0 Folding Fat Tire e-bike back to the $1,199 low for the first time in 2026, a returning Segway Max G30P e-scooter low, an exclusive new mini electric dirt bike low, and so much more. Head on down below to check out all the best Green Deals we’ve collected for you over the week.

more…
